summary: This document is a Q&A preparation sheet for an accelerator application, detailing the founders' origin story, product vision, and competitive landscape. It outlines the equity split between founders, revenue models, and includes an update section noting progress such as user acquisition and competitor identification. The content reveals early-stage metrics like team size and prototype status.
